title: The Trap Closes Around Brogy
description: On pages 17–19, the trap closes around brogy as the hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets.
scene: The Trap Closes Around Brogy. The hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You seem to be winning in pain!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Quite the stubborn one, aren't you, DORRY THE BLUE OGRE?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why don't I lend a helping hand?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: The Battle is Mine Now, DORRY!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the trap closes around brogy. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
